title: coldenia greggii
intro: Coldenia greggii, also known as Gregg's coldenia, is a flowering plant in the borage family native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing. Coldenia greggii can be used in herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
